positive: A lush, detailed botanical illustration featuring exotic jungle flowers and delicate ferns, rendered in a vintage scientific drawing style with soft watercolor washes. Focus on intricate leaf veins and vibrant, jewel-toned colors, isolated on a cream background, highly detailed, elegant, hyper-realistic botanical art.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, sketch, graffiti, messy lines
